title: rubus granulatus var. mentitus
intro: Rubus granulatus var. mentitus, also known as the 'fool's thimbleberry', is a variety of the thimbleberry plant that is native to certain regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Rubus granulatus var. mentitus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
